title: stelis antennata
intro: Stelis antennata, also known as the Antenna Orchid, is a type of flowering plant species belonging to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis antennata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
